risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as 'High' in the systematic risk assessment, indicating ongoing fragility in the political environment that could impact project implementation continuity and stakeholder engagement.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating: High (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 09 - 22 May 2024)

risk_title: Government-Mandated Cost Pressures Affecting Project Sustainability
risk_summary: Government-mandated increases in staffing costs and rising electricity tariffs have caused O&M expenses to increase by 50%, severely impacting the implementing agency's financial performance and ability to sustain operations, indicating governance-driven fiscal pressures.
evidence_quote: O&M expenses increased drastically by almost 50%, in large part due to government-mandated increases in staffing costs and rising electricity tariffs.

risk_title: Delays in Informal Settlement Service Delivery
risk_summary: Implementation delays in Katchi Abadi (informal settlement) water and sewerage services, with one site (Essa Nagri) showing only 8.09% physical progress, indicate challenges in delivering services to vulnerable populations and potential social tensions.
evidence_quote: The mission discussed the delays at Essa Nagri and agreed on a roadmap for timely completion. Physical progress: Soba Nagar = 40.5% Essa Nagri = 8.09%
